shortDescription: An empty California estate fully imagined — staged for the listing camera and the open-house walkthrough alike.
longDescription: A sprawling vacant home in Fallbrook hills, dressed top to bottom with a warm, livable luxury palette tuned to attract buyers in the upper segment. Brass pendants, neutral textiles, layered art, and a tight three-week inventory rolling rental kept the home camera-ready through the entire listing window.

photos.alt: Open-concept kitchen, dining, and living room staged with brass and warm neutrals

Primary bedroom staged with crisp linens, walnut bed frame, and soft layered lighting
Bedroom with reading chair, layered rugs, and refined accessories
Designed primary bedroom with brass mirror, sage accent wall, and refined linens
